lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl, Second House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
The Creator has staged His Wondrous Play.
The self-willed manmukhs are deluded and confused, while the Gurmukhs understand.
I listen to the Unstruck Sound-current of the Shabad, and the Bani of His Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad merai antar dhiaan |
lines.english: Deep within my being, I meditate on the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਉ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau kabahu na chhoddau har kaa naam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I shall never forsake the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
The Creator creates the Cause that causes. ||1||
Prahlaad's father sent him to school, to learn to read.
He took his writing tablet and went to the teacher.
He said, "I shall not read anything except the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਪਟੀਆ ਲਿਖਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: meree patteea likh dehu gobind muraar |2|
lines.english: Write the Lord's Name on my tablet." ||2||
Prahlaad's mother said to her son,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਛੋਡਉ ਤਉ ਕੁਲਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਗਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je har chhoddau tau kul laagai gaal |3|
lines.english: If I were to forsake the Lord, then my family would be disgraced." ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau daataa har jeeo merai naal |
lines.english: He answered, "The Great Giver, my Fearless Lord God is always with me.
"I advise you not to read anything except what you are taught."
"Prahlaad has corrupted all the other students.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਾਰਾ ਕਹਿਆ ਨ ਸੁਣੈ ਆਪਣੇ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: hamaaraa kahiaa na sunai aapane kaaraj savaare |
lines.english: He does not listen to what I say, and he does his own thing.
Sanda and Marka, his teachers, made the complaint.
He instigated devotional worship in the townspeople."

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਟ ਸਭਾ ਕਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dusatt sabhaa kaa kichh na vasaaee |4|
lines.english: The gathering of the wicked people could not do anything against him. ||4||
All the demons kept trying in vain.
What can be done by mere created beings? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kee pat raakhai soee |
lines.english: The Lord protected His humble devotee, and preserved his honor.
Because of his past karma, the demon ruled over his kingdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਿਨਿ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har na boojhai tin aap bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: He did not realize the Lord; the Lord Himself confused him.
He started an argument with his son Prahlaad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦੁ ਕੋਠੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਬਾਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਤਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: prahalaad kotthe vich raakhiaa baar deea taalaa |
lines.english: Prahlaad was placed in a cell, and the door was locked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਾ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਨੇੜੈ ਆਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: andhaa na boojhai kaal nerrai aaeaa |6|
lines.english: The blind one did not understand that his death was approaching. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਰੀਕੀ ਕਰੈ ਅਨਹੋਦਾ ਨਾਉ ਧਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa hovai sareekee karai anahodaa naau dharaaeaa |
lines.english: The created being tried to compete with his Creator, but he assumed this name in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਬਾਲਕੁ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਡਰਈ ਮੇਰੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau baalak mool na ddaree merai antar gur gopaalaa |
lines.english: The fearless child was not afraid at all. He said, "Within my being, is the Guru, the Lord of the World."

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋੁ ਆਇ ਪਹੁਤਾ ਜਨ ਸਿਉ ਵਾਦੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa so aae pahutaa jan siau vaad rachaaeaa |7|
lines.english: That which was predestined for him has come to pass; he started an argument with the Lord's humble servant. ||7||
The father raised the club to strike down Prahlaad, saying,
Wherever I look, I see Him permeating and prevailing." ||8||
"Where is your God, the Lord of the Universe, now?"
He replied, "The Life of the World, the Great Giver, is my Help and Support in the end.
The minds of the devotees were filled with bliss, and congratulations poured in.
The egotistical demon was killed and destroyed.
Tearing down the pillars, the Lord Himself appeared.
The Creator has ordained coming and going in reincarnation.
He created birth, death and attachment.
He blessed His servant with glorious greatness. ||9||
The word of the devotee came true. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦ ਕੈ ਕਾਰਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: prahalaad kai kaaraj har aap dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: For the sake of Prahlaad, the Lord Himself appeared.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵ ਕੁਲੀ ਲਖਿਮੀ ਕਉ ਕਰਹਿ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dev kulee lakhimee kau kareh jaikaar |
lines.english: The gods proclaimed the victory of Lakshmi, and said,
"O mother, make this form of the Man-lion disappear!"

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖਿਮੀ ਭਉ ਕਰੈ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lakhimee bhau karai na saakai jaae |
lines.english: Lakshmi was afraid, and did not approach.
